delta_vs_v6: Added forward-validated class offsets (currently only Center×PTS).

PTS|position|Center.discovered_via: Collatz residual-class noise-floor protocol; refit on 3-season cohort 2026-05-02
PTS|position|Center.notes: Centers over-projected on PTS. 24-25 magnitude (-0.292) ~half of prior years; signal fading as base model improves. 3-season combined alpha = -0.587. SSE for additive vs mult nearly identical (382 vs 385) — keeping additive form per original mechanism.

PTS|mid_season_change|True.discovered_via: Worst-miss decomposition + cross-season validation + add-vs-mult regression refit at 3-season
PTS|mid_season_change|True.notes: Players on teams with mid-season HC change over-projected on PTS. Multiplicative form (residual scales with proj_PTS) confirmed at 3-season. Magnitude faded -1.896 -> -1.207 -> -0.301 across years. 3-season c = -6.18% (was -8.4% at 2-season).

AST|years_pro_bucket|13+.discovered_via: Cross-season full validation + add-vs-mult regression refit at 3-season; refreshed post class-feature cleanup
AST|years_pro_bucket|13+.notes: Veterans (13+ years pro) over-projected on AST. Mult form strong at 3-season (slope p<0.001). 24-25 magnitude refreshed from -0.088 to -0.120 after class cleanup (pre-2014 vets that were leaking into 'undrafted' bucket returned to 13+ where they belong). 3-season c = -7.22% (was -9.1% at 2-season).

validation_protocol: Collatz residual-class noise-floor protocol (per feedback_collatz_protocol_for_projections.md). SNR>=1.5 gate, LOO honesty, top-1 class per stat, then forward across-season validation required before ship.
next_validation_date: When 26-27 ship CSV available — re-derive offsets from 25-26 backtest residuals and verify against 26-27 cohort.
